clinical_history: The patient presents for hypertension follow-up. Home blood pressure readings are frequently around 150/95 mmHg despite current medication.

detailed_findings.finding: No reported chest pain, dyspnea, or neurologic deficits

impression_summary: Poorly controlled hypertension requiring medication adjustment.
recommendations: Adjust antihypertensive regimen or add a second agent.
Encourage lifestyle modifications including salt restriction and weight management.
Schedule follow-up blood pressure check in 2–4 weeks.
